1604.reason: [The while loop uses lexer.getToken(idx) which does not advance the lexer position, causing infinite loop or incorrect parsing when the current token is not ';'. This leads to missing error detection for missing ')' in function call like f(a + 10; on line 3, as the parser gets stuck or misinterprets the structure.]

2361.reason: [The condition uses String.contains() which will match a single '|' as well, incorrectly treating it as the operator. This may lead to false acceptance of a malformed '|' token, which should be flagged as error type 'a'. Should use equals("||") instead.]

559.reason: The Lexer's init() method accesses srccode.charAt(p+1) without bounds check when encountering '|' or '&' at the end of the string, causing a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException at runtime.

1445.reason: The code fails to report error 'j' (missing right parenthesis) when ')' is not found in MainFuncDef, unlike parseFuncDef which correctly handles this case. This causes the missing error report for line 3.
